calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-03-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch.

Mr. Der announced the terms of the sale for the record. The Court approved the 6% sales commissions. The sale was confirmed at $1,219,550.00. The Court granted the petition, (subject to a written order). No bond is required.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
